description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a landscaped plot with a paved driveway leading to a garage and a car parked in front. The building features a flat roof with multiple levels, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior wall finishes. Surrounding the bungalow are various trees, shrubs, and flowering plants, creating a lush garden environment. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a swing set, indicating family-friendly amenities. The property is bordered by grass lawns and decorative trees, with a clear separation between the driveway and the garden spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a paved driveway, and landscaped gardens featuring trees and flowering shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, car, and main entrance with prominent landscaping and trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the garden, two white flowering trees, and the back lawn with less visible driveway.
description_view_2: Backyard view displaying the patio area, outdoor furniture, swing set, and extensive greenery behind the house.
description_view_3: Angled view from the driveway side, showing the car, garage, and a mix of trees and shrubs along the property edge.
